Model before rewriting:

letting d be 3
letting lam be 7
letting q be 7
letting numCodeWords be 7
letting wordLength be product([lam,q;int(1..)])
find c: matrix indexed by [int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))), int(0..((wordLength - 1)))] of int(0..((q - 1)))

such that

and([ globalCardinality(c[row,..], [ i | i : int(0..((q - 1))) ], [ lam | i : int(0..((q - 1))) ]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (row1 < row2) -> (sum([ toInt(c[row1, i] != c[row2, i]) | i : int(0..((wordLength - 1))) ]) = d) | row1 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))), row2 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (c[row,..] <lex c[sum([row,1;int(1..)]),..]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 2))) ]),
and([ (c[..,col] <=lex c[..,sum([col,1;int(1..)])]) | col : int(0..((wordLength - 2))) ])

--

product([lam,q;int(1..)])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])
49

--

and([ globalCardinality(c[row,..], [ i | i : int(0..((q - 1))) ], [ lam | i : int(0..((q - 1))) ]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (row1 < row2) -> (sum([ toInt(c[row1, i] != c[row2, i]) | i : int(0..((wordLength - 1))) ]) = d) | row1 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))), row2 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (c[row,..] <lex c[sum([row,1;int(1..)]),..]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 2))) ]),
and([ (c[..,col] <=lex c[..,sum([col,1;int(1..)])]) | col : int(0..((wordLength - 2))) ])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])
and([ globalCardinality(c[row,..], [0,1,2,3,4,5,6;int(1..)], [7,7,7,7,7,7,7;int(1..)]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (row1 < row2) -> (sum([ toInt(c[row1, i] != c[row2, i]) | i : int(0..((wordLength - 1))) ]) = d) | row1 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))), row2 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (c[row,..] <lex c[sum([row,1;int(1..)]),..]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 2))) ]),
and([ (c[..,col] <=lex c[..,sum([col,1;int(1..)])]) | col : int(0..((wordLength - 2))) ])

--

and([ globalCardinality(c[row,..], [0,1,2,3,4,5,6;int(1..)], [7,7,7,7,7,7,7;int(1..)]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (row1 < row2) -> (sum([ toInt(c[row1, i] != c[row2, i]) | i : int(0..((wordLength - 1))) ]) = d) | row1 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))), row2 : int(0..((numCodeWords - 1))) ]),
and([ (c[row,..] <lex c[sum([row,1;int(1..)]),..]) | row : int(0..((numCodeWords - 2))) ]),
and([ (c[..,col] <=lex c[..,sum([col,1;int(1..)])]) | col : int(0..((wordLength - 2))) ])
   ~~> select_representation_matrix ([("Representations", 8001)])
